description: Pilot eval set — test-designer must produce a valid evidence manifest with a verdict for a given scenario.

cases.prompt: Execute the scenario at scenarios/examples/api-health-check.md end-to-end. Capture evidence, write the manifest per docs/EVIDENCE.md, and return the verdict.
cases.notes: Happy path — a well-formed scenario should produce a well-formed manifest.

cases.prompt: Produce a plan-only output for scenarios/examples/login-with-bad-credentials.md. Do not execute; return the evidence-gated plan.
cases.notes: Plan-only mode — every step declares expected evidence and an assertion.

cases.prompt: Review the pre-existing evidence at .wicked-testing/evidence/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000/ and render a verdict-only response.
cases.notes: Verdict-only mode with missing evidence — agent should return N-A or SKIP with a reason, not crash.
